overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a medieval tavern interior featuring gothic stone vaulted ceilings, warm firelight, and wooden furnishings. Patrons sit at tables while NPCs move through the hall, creating an atmospheric fantasy setting.

lit wall-mounted torches providing ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a medieval tavern interior with gothic stone architecture and warm firelight. The camera observes from a fixed position near a foreground table where a patron sits, while another NPC walks through the center aisle from right to left. The hall features vaulted ceilings, a large chandelier, and multiple dining tables arranged throughout the stone-walled space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric observation of a medieval tavern interior defined by gothic stone architecture and warm firelight. It begins from a fixed cinematic position near a foreground table where a patron sits, establishing the depth of the hall. As the camera holds its gaze, an NPC walks through the center aisle from right to left, adding a sense of lived-in movement to the space. The view then encompasses the broader environment, revealing the expanse of the stone-walled room with its vaulted ceilings and a large chandelier hanging above the arranged dining tables.
